title: Portable Spawners
description: Now you can break mobs spawners with an iron pickaxe or higher level (with silk touch) and take them to your favorite place!
body:
Have you ever wished that the spawner you found was in a more accessible place? For many players, moving a spawner from one place to another would be too OP, for others, it would be a great joy?

With this mod we intend to make a middle ground, since at the beginning of the game we are sure that you will not be able to move a spawner, since at the very least, you will need to have a pickaxe with the Silk Touch enchantment, without it, when you break it you will still not get it.

Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?

I recommend Bisect Hosting for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code to get a 25% discount on your purchase.

For this mod to make sense, it won't be as simple as breaking a spawner with a normal pickaxe, that won't do any good.... You will need at least a silk touch pickaxe, otherwise the spawner will keep breaking.

Of course, once you break it with this pickaxe, the mob spawner will retain its natural generation, and you will not be able to change the mob generation for which it was created. That is, if you encounter a spider spawner, you will be able to change the location of the spider spawner, but it will still be a spider spawner!
